question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It immediately produced the solution and a table of test cases without inviting the user to think about anything.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks were posed to the user. The classic gotcha (century vs 400-year exception) was just explained, not surfaced as a question.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding — the full answer was given on turn 1 with no progressive build-up. The user did the tracing work spontaneously, not because of guided prompts.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the Pair correctly affirmed and gently corrected the precedence misunderstanding, but it's a one-way explanation rather than a real didactic dialogue.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
